notes: Use TSX, TSX Venture, CSE, NEO/Cboe Canada, SEDAR+ and issuer sources first.
Use Yahoo Finance with .TO or .V suffix for validated OHLCV when reliable.
Use EODHD only when Yahoo is unavailable, stale, incomplete or lacks a required completed bar.
Normalize EODHD OHLC with the adjusted-close ratio when adjusted_close is present; otherwise mark the series UNADJUSTED_OHLCV.
Never blend providers inside one indicator series.
